text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Groan. Trainer, can we take a break?
choice_data_list: Are you still tired from our last session?
Are you still tired from our last session?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I maybe didn't get enough sleep. I was up
late writing messages on all my flyers.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But aren't I just the cutest when I'm working so hard? Yaaawn... Anyway, good night...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate her passion, but it seems like Smart
Falcon isn't resting properly.
